---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new content, sections, or structure for the NEXUS blueprint
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "blueprint"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the proposed addition.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What gap in the current blueprint does it fill? Reference
existing documents by `NX-DOC-####` ID where relevant.

## Proposed location

- New file in existing directory: `path/to/file.md`
- New directory: `NN_CATEGORY/`
- New master prompt: `99_MASTER_PROMPTS/<name>.md`
- New document ID range: `NX-DOC-####` …

## Detailed proposal

Outline of the content, key headings, and any cross-references it would create.

## Alternatives considered

Optional. Other ways to address the same gap and why this proposal is preferred.

## Affected documents

List of existing documents that would need to be updated or cross-referenced.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] The proposal is consistent with `00_EXECUTIVE/Vision.md` and `00_EXECUTIVE/Principles.md`
- [ ] I have considered where this fits in `MASTER_INDEX.md` reading order
